title: Persistent loading state with optimistic UI
design_brief: User taps action → optimistic update shown immediately; if server fails, revert with animation.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Wait for server before UI change
mobile_reasoning: Local state updates first; revert on error.

what_makes_this_native: rn-498 is native because Persistent loading state with optimistic UI depends on RN touch semantics, platform accessibility, safe-area/keyboard behavior, and device performance constraints instead of web-only layout assumptions.

title: Distinctive splash + branding for a fitness app
design_brief: Complete branding moment: splash with logo bloom + brand color + heartbeat sound on launch. Combines patterns from rn-187, rn-097, and brand identity. The synthesis of everything in this dataset — a launch experience that announces 'this is a real mobile app, made with care.'
mobile_reasoning: Splash held until brand animation completes; logo blooms via Skia path morph; heartbeat ECG line from rn-097 animates briefly; on tap or auto after 1.5s, transitions to home with shared element of logo. The accumulated patterns from this dataset, applied in concert.

stylesheet_strategy.organization: FitnessBrandSplash composes LogoMark, ECGLine, and shared-element transition to home.
stylesheet_strategy.constants: For rn-500, define named constants for Distinctive splash + branding for a fitness app: MIN_TOUCH = 44, safe-area edge padding, and the component-specific sizes used by the snippet instead of anonymous inline numbers.
stylesheet_strategy.platform_differences: For rn-500, isolate cross_platform differences for Distinctive splash + branding for a fitness app: shadow/elevation, keyboard/safe-area behavior, native picker/sheet/map APIs, and permission prompts stay behind a tiny adapter rather than branching through render code.
stylesheet_strategy.responsive_strategy: For rn-500, test Distinctive splash + branding for a fitness app at 320pt width, large Dynamic Type, landscape/tablet split view, and notched safe areas; derive widths from useWindowDimensions or parent layout and preserve 44px touch targets.

animation_strategy: Logo entry: scale 0→1 with bounce spring. ECG line draws once over 1s. Heartbeat sound plays via expo-av. Transition: logo shrinks to header position via shared element.
gesture_strategy: Tap to skip (touch anywhere). Auto-advance after 1.5s.
interaction_details: Logo blooms with spring + success haptic
Heartbeat ECG line animates + audio plays
Shared element: logo can morph into header on next screen
accessibility_considerations: Accessibility contract for rn-500 (Distinctive splash + branding for a fitness app): name the primary native control, keep every Pressable/TextInput/gesture target at least 44px or add hitSlop, expose an explicit non-gesture path for any swipe/pan/long-press behavior, and verify VoiceOver/TalkBack announces state changes without raw implementation details.
performance_notes: Keeps the visual treatment for Distinctive splash + branding for a fitness app token-driven and stable; measure layout passes after theme changes and ensure contrast/blur fallbacks do not trigger extra renders.
what_makes_this_native: 1) System SplashScreen control. 2) Combined haptic + audio + visual = multi-sensory mobile experience. 3) Native blur, GPU drawing, system splash — the whole dataset's patterns synthesized into one launch moment that announces 'this is mobile, made with intention.'
